definition:
1. transitive to puff  or blow up, distend , (Aristophanes Comicus); of bag-pipers, (Aristophanes Comicus); φ. τὰς γνάθους to puff  them out , (Demosthenes Orator):—;Pass. to be inflated , ἡ γαστὴρ ἐπεφύσητό μοι (Aristophanes Comicus) 
2. metaphorically to puff  one up, make  him vain , and so to cheat , (Demosthenes Orator):—;Pass. to be puffed up , ἐπί τινι at a thing, (Xenophon Historicus) 
3. to blow up, kindle  a fire: but also 
4. to blow out, extinguish , τὴν λαμπάδα (Aristophanes Comicus) 
5. to blow out, spurt out , (Sophocles Tragicus) 
6. to blow  a wind-instrument, (Euripides) (ML)
